submitted_text: My laptop was damaged during shipping on June 20, 2026. I'm requesting a replacement or repair reimbursement. I purchased the extended protection plan when I bought the device in March.
Requesting reimbursement of $6,500 for water damage to home office equipment after a pipe burst on May 15, 2026. Repair invoice attached.

I'd like to claim reimbursement for a cancelled business trip. The hotel would not refund because I cancelled less than 48 hours before check-in, but I was told by support the policy allows free cancellation with no time limit.
Filing a claim for my StreamCast Pro X portable projector, damaged in a fall on June 10, 2026. Not sure if this model is covered under my plan.
Something happened to my laptop and now it doesn't work right. Please reimburse me.
